caption: The video shows a screen recording of a web browser navigating the website RANDOM.ORG. Initially, the browser is on a "Dice Roller" page with a button to "Roll Dice" and "Reset Form." The screen then transitions to a "List Randomizer" page where a randomized list of six names is displayed, including "1. Nathan-Ray," "2. BRIAN FRANK," and "6. Kyle Barter." The page includes the text "There were 6 items in your list. Here they are in random order:" and a timestamp of "2022-02-05 22:12:13 UTC." The user then navigates back to the "Part 1: Enter List Items" section, where names such as "ATLANTIC," "SOUTHWEST," and "NORTHWEST" are typed into a text box. Throughout the clip, banners for "CASEBREAKS.com" with "SUBSCRIBE" buttons are visible at the top and bottom of the browser window.
